allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in ['notif','haptic','async','tanstack','query','netinfo','reanimated']\)]")
